body.title: CLOSED: Igor cognition-debug as MCP capability — claim/status/release verbs + skill consumer
body.result: debug_session.py (claim/status/release/query/log_line) + debug_session_cli.py + 10 tests. Skills updated. Commit 32b2d901. MCP surface deferred to agent_datacenter arrival.
body.description:
**Approved 2026-05-03 (Akien — 'all is approved! go!').** Second concrete capability migration under theigors/rules/capability-protocol. Replaces the flag-file dance (~/.TheIgors/Igor-wild-0001/debug_session.flag) with first-class MCP claim/status/release verbs.

**Two-sided per the rule:** ships handler (MCP capability) AND skill consumer (skill files updated to call it).

**Capability surface (matches theigors/rules/capability-protocol/vocabulary):**
- `claim(scope)` — request a debug session (returns handle).
- `status(handle)` — check if Igor is in debug mode + which scope.
- `release(handle)` — exit debug mode for that scope.
- `query(handle)` — read recent debug log lines.

**Affected files:**
- HANDLER: agent_datacenter/devices/igor_debug/cognition_debug_capability.py (NEW MCP tool registration), wild_igor/igor/cognition/debug_session.py (NEW or existing — manages live state). Replaces flag-file mechanism.
- SKILL CONSUMER: /home/akien/.claude/skills/context-load/SKILL.md (Step 0.5 — replace `touch debug_session.flag` with mcp__igor__cognition_debug_claim), /home/akien/.claude/skills/savestateauto/SKILL.md (Step 3 — replace `rm debug_session.flag` with mcp__igor__cognition_debug_release).
**Design rules:** theigors/rules/capability-protocol (parent), theigors/rules/capability-protocol/vocabulary (uses `claim`/`status`/`release`/`query`), theigors/rules/capability-protocol/two-sided-build, theigors/rules/igor-constraints (Igor cognition path remains in-stack — only the entry point moves to MCP).
**Scope boundary:** IN: MCP capability + skill consumer migration for context-load + savestateauto. IN: backwards-compat — flag-file still works during transition (handler writes the flag too). OUT: deleting the flag-file mechanism (separate follow-on after burn-in). OUT: debug session telemetry/dashboard.
**Test plan:** pytest for the MCP handler (claim returns handle, release clears state, status reflects current); CC.1 integration test that exercises /context-load and asserts mcp__igor__cognition_debug_claim is called instead of bash touch.
